agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Audit runtime behavior and API consistency for the 20260410-182313 batch (WIP git + triggers scope).

findings.title: Portfolio orchestration uses file-backed engine status while engine status API uses Postgres when DATABASE_URL is set
findings.description: GET /api/orchestration always calls synchronous getEngineStatus() from audit-reader (repair_queue.json + audits/runs). GET /api/engine/status, when jobsStoreConfigured(), rebuilds queue_size, queued_findings, repair_run_count, and active_audit_jobs from penny_repair_jobs and penny_audit_jobs. A configured dashboard can therefore show different queue/repair summaries on portfolio orchestration consumers than on Shell/Activity (which uses /api/engine/status).

proof_hooks.summary: orchestration route resolves getEngineStatus() only (no DB branch)
engine/status uses listRecentRepairJobs + countActiveAuditJobs when DB configured

history.notes: logic-20260410-182313; focus paths orchestration vs engine status.

findings.title: Worker admin CLI usage comment duplicates npx tsx
findings.description: File header shows `npx tsx tsx src/scripts/admin.ts queue` (double tsx). Operators copying the line get a failing command.

proof_hooks.summary: Usage block line 8: duplicate tsx token

next_actions.action: Align /api/orchestration engine snapshot with /api/engine/status when DATABASE_URL is configured (shared helper or reuse cached engine/status payload).
next_actions.rationale: Prevents divergent queue and cost numbers between portfolio and Activity views.

next_actions.action: Fix admin.ts usage comment to a single `npx tsx src/scripts/admin.ts ...` per subcommand.
Track f-0d9b4509 implementation decision (onboarding cluster persistence) in product backlog.
next_actions.rationale: Still accepted question from prior run; unchanged in this scope.
